title: pilea bracteosa var. oxyodon
intro: Pilea bracteosa var. oxyodon, also known as the Chinese ivy or Chinese fan flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and treating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and bronchodilatory properties. In herbal preparations, Pilea bracteosa var. oxyodon is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
